stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The weather most likely to be experienced at position "A" is…

options.a: cumulus, cumulonimbus clouds, heavy rain or snow showers, medium to strong winds.
options.b: clear skies, good visibility in light winds.
options.c: mainly overcast with stratus or stratocumulus and drizzle, medium to strong winds.
options.d: radiation fog, low stratus, drizzle, no medium or upper cloud, light wind.
